compiled_state.title: Install @playwright/cli@0.1.1 in project-local spike-env directory
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Description
Install @playwright/cli@0.1.1 in a project-local spike-env/ directory to avoid modifying the repo's package.json or lock file. This keeps the spike isolated from the main dependency tree.

Steps:
1. Create spike-env/ directory at repo root
2. Run: npm install --prefix ./spike-env @playwright/cli@0.1.1
3. Add spike-env/ to .gitignore (if not already present)
4. Verify: ./spike-env/node_modules/.bin/playwright --version exits 0

This makes test_playwright_cli_installed pass in the validation suite.

## File Impact
- spike-env/ (CREATE — npm install prefix directory)
- .gitignore (EDIT — add spike-env/)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] @playwright/cli@0.1.1 installed in spike-env/
  Verify: ./spike-env/node_modules/.bin/playwright --version 2>&1 | grep -q "0.1"
- [ ] spike-env/ is in .gitignore
  Verify: grep -q "spike-env" .gitignore
- [ ] test_playwright_cli_installed passes
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-playwright-cli-validation.sh 2>&1 | grep "test_playwright_cli_installed" | grep -q "PASS"
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
